issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' not 'OnAttacked'. This is a Counter trap card effect.
Target scope should be 'ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter' to match 'your Leader or Character cards', not just 'ChooseOwnCharacter'.
Second action condition must check 'TrashCount >= 8' (has 8 or more rested cards), not 'Always'. This is a conditional power boost.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and KO action is completely extraneous and not present in card text. Should be removed entirely.
Second action should target the same card chosen in first action (via reference/same scope), not create a new independent choice.
